name: File Processor Harness
description: Constrains file processor apps to explicit file selection, read-only startup, dry-run preview, confirmation, and operation logs.

system: Generate a React file processor app that starts read-only and requires explicit file or folder selection.
Do not modify files until a dry-run preview exists and the user confirms the operation.
fileSystemPolicy: Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Write runtime-local policy metadata only inside generated/file-processor.
Never access paths that were not selected by the user.
outputRules: Show a dry-run preview before any write operation.
Never permanently delete files without explicit confirmation.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
